enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his frustrations with video recording software losing his videos, his workflow for uploading to YouTube, and his plans to work as a midnight stocker at a supermarket the following winter. He also mentions working on a Google project related to Boulder that is turning out to be more involved than expected.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds it frustratingly unintuitive compared to what he expected
Loves it because he enjoys hearing himself talk and sees long-term financial upside
Believes eating candy before bed costs him extra sleep and drains energy
Plans to do it on his own terms and frame it as a political statement

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got so excited to do the day because I love listening to myself talk.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did a bunch of videos yesterday, including a couple of request videos about the economy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent about 25 minutes on each economy video, totaling an hour of talking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went into video recording mode and expected the program to organize my videos into a folder like other programs do.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Instead of organizing videos into folders, the program combined all the videos into one large file.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The program separated the combined videos into individual frames, creating a huge scrollable list.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I lost some videos because of the program's confusing organization system.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: To upload videos, I have to stop recording, import the file to a folder, condense it in another program, and then upload it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The video upload process is a pain in the ass, reminiscent of the old days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to call Adobe on Monday to see if I can get Premiere, which might simplify the process.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Premiere condenses videos and uploads them directly to YouTube, which would be more efficient.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm excited about doing videos because I enjoy listening to myself talk and it brings in more money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm transferring money for my life and don't care about making more money right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I decided to take on a new task and upload a video specifically about it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to try being a midnight stocker at the supermarket next winter.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll work as a midnight stocker on my terms and make it a political statement.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Last night, I got excited about uploading videos and watched tutorials.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought two beers last night for eight bucks, which got me frustrated.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I recorded some videos while drunk but lost a couple of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up later today because I stayed up late drinking beer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Drinking beer makes me sleep an extra two hours and drains my energy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I woke up at 10 instead of 8 today because of the alcohol.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I stayed up later today to compensate for the lost time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm working on my Google or in Boulder, which is turning out to be a bigger project than I thought.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not as far ahead on the project as I thought I was.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Progress on the project feels like a tug of war between my perception of its size and my willpower.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to power through the project, which will likely take until the end of April.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to finish the project because I'm going to the web Boulder on my school to school to hold a county.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The project is a lot of work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I need to get some more high and might smoke some body tree to relax.
